description:
2026 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring, 4.0 F6, RWD, 503bhp, 7 Speed PDK Automatic. AED 1,189,000 AED 18,628 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 4,746 KM's - Porsche Warranty Valid Until March 2028 (Extendable) - GCC Specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Oak Green Metallic Neo - Cohiba Brown Interior - Full PPF - 20/21" 911 GT3 Forged Aluminium Lightweight Wheels - Adaptive Sports Seats Plus (18-Way, Electric) - Rear Seats - Seat Heating (Front) - Leather Interior Exclusive Manufaktur - Extended Leather Package - Airblades Front Apron Painted in Exterior Colour - Exterior Mirror Upper Trims Carbon - Front Axle Lift - Brake Calipers Painted in High Gloss Black - HD Matrix LED Headlights - 'PORSCHE' Logo LED Door Courtesy Lights - Sports Seats Plus Backrests Leather - Steering Column Casing Leather - Pedals And Footrest Aluminium - Door Sill Guards Brushed Aluminium In Black, Illuminated - Bose Surround Sound System - Light Design Package
